hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[ ;]|&&|\|\|)git (commit|push)( |$)'; then echo 'Pre-commit compile check...' >&2; if ! ./gradlew :composeApp:compileAndroidMain -q 2>&1; then echo 'COMPILE FAILED — fix errors before committing/pushing' >&2; exit 2; fi; echo 'Compile OK' >&2; fi
